Task #2 completed. Updated DATABASE_ERD_MERMAID.md with all missing entities:

**New sections added:**
- Section 6-1: BarJu (6 entities) + EMP (3 entities) — order/logistics domain
- Section 8-1: CashRefund, CsTemplate, CsGroupProcessHistory — CRM additions
- Section 13: PopularKeywordDeployHistory — keyword domain
- Section 14: CalendarEntity — calendar domain
- Section 15: LinkAdminConfigurations — system config domain

**Existing sections updated:**
- Section 1 (overview): Added 11 new relationship rows and diagram connections
- Section 4 (Partner): Added 11 entities — PartnerCsReport, PartnerDailyReport, PartnerDeliveryReport, PartnerGoodsReport, PartnerReport, PartnerMemoDashboard, PartnerOrderDelayMemo, PartnerSmsSendHistory, PartnerSmsSendPolicy, PartnerStatIndicatorsManageHistory, PartnerStatIndicatorsStds
- Section 9 (Settlement): Expanded PurchaseAmountItems fields, added PurchaseAmountDeposit and PurchaseAmountMonthlyMemo

All FK relationships verified against actual @ManyToOne annotations in entity code. Mermaid syntax is consistent throughout.

Task #1 completed. DATABASE_ERD.md has been updated with all missing entities and corrections:

**Added to Partner section (11 entities):**
- PartnerCsReport, PartnerDailyReport, PartnerDeliveryReport, PartnerGoodsReport, PartnerReport
- PartnerMemoDashboard, PartnerOrderDelayMemo
- PartnerSmsSendHistory, PartnerSmsSendPolicy
- PartnerStatIndicatorsManageHistory (+ PartnerManageIndicators collection table), PartnerStatIndicatorsStds

**Added to Order section (9 entities):**
- BarJuReady, BarJuReadyError, BarJuProgress, BarJuHistory, BarJuConvertError, BarJuDispatchError
- EmpLocation, EmpMatchingProduct, EmpProductCodeTemp

**Added to CRM section (7 entities):**
- ProductInquiry, ProductInquiryAnswer, ProductInquiryOrder, ProductInquiryOrderOption
- CashRefund, CsTemplate, CsGroupProcessHistory

**Added to Settlement section (2 entities):**
- PurchaseAmountDeposit, PurchaseAmountMonthlyMemo
- Also added missing validDateKind and purchaseAmountId FK to PurchaseAmountItems

**Added to 기타 운영 section (3 entities with full schemas):**
- Calendar, PopularKeywordDeployHistory, LinkAdminConfigurations

**Enum section enhanced:**
- Order: BarJuPeriodKind, BarJuHistoryKind, BarJuProcessKind, LogisticsPackageKind, LogisticsLocationKind
- CRM: ProductInquiryDisplayStatusKind, CashRefundStatus, CsTemplateCategory, CsTemplateKind, CsGroupProcessHistoryKind, MentionedKind
- Settlement: PurchaseAmountStatus, PurchaseAmountDepositStatus, RejectionReason
- Partner: PartnerSmsSendPolicyKind, PartnerSmsSendResultKind, PartnerStatIndicatorsActionTakenKind, PartnerStatIndicatorsManageIndicatorsKind

**Other fixes:**
- Split combined column notations (e.g. `unitCnt/boxCnt/pieceCnt` → separate rows)
- Split `viewCount/purchaseCount`, `revenueRate/discountRate`, `totalSales/totalProfit` into separate rows
- Updated logical FK reference table (17-10) with all new entity relationships
- Cross-referenced BarJu/Emp summary tables to detailed schemas in Order section
summary: Task #1 completed - DATABASE_ERD.md updated with 32+ entities
